final_text:
{
  "project_name": "Cricket Worldcup Management System",
  "business_summary": "The Cricket Worldcup Management System is designed to manage and organize the cricket worldcup events, including player registrations, match scheduling, and results management.",
  "actors": [
    "Administrators",
    "Players",
    "Coaches",
    "Spectators"
  ],
  "functional_requirements": [
    "User registration and authentication",
    "Match scheduling and management",
    "Player statistics tracking",
    "Live score updates",
    "Notifications and alerts"
  ],
  "non_functional_requirements": [
    "High availability",
    "Scalability",
    "Security",
    "Performance"
  ],
  "technology_stack": {
    "frontend": "React",
    "backend": "Node.js",
    "database": "MongoDB",
    "authentication": "JWT"
  },
  "architecture_pattern": "Microservices architecture",
  "modules": [
    "User Management",
    "Match Management",
    "Statistics",
    "Notifications"
  ],
  "entities": [
    "User",
    "Match",
    "Team",
    "Player"
  ],
  "apis": [
    "User API",
    "Match API",
    "Statistics API",
    "Notification API"
  ],
  "integrations": [
    "Email service",
    "SMS service",
    "Third-party statistics API"
  ],
  "security": {
    "https": true,
    "jwt_for_authentication": true,
    "data_encryption": true
  },
  "developer_handoff": [
    "Detailed API documentation and codebase available on GitHub."
  ],
  "qa_handoff": [
    "Test cases and environment setup instructions provided."
  ],
  "deployment_handoff": [
    "CI/CD pipeline configured with automated deployment to cloud services."
  ]
}
